tools.name: generate_env
tools.description: Generate a .env file for the current project by resolving secrets from the envpact vault. Reads .env.example, resolves shared.KEY references and per-environment objects, and writes .env atomically. Auto-detects project from git remote.

project_name.description: Project name override. Auto-detected from git remote if omitted.

environment.description: Environment to resolve (development/staging/production). Defaults to project._default_env or 'default'.

working_directory.description: Path to the project directory containing .env.example. Defaults to cwd.

output_path.description: Output path for the .env file. Defaults to .env in working_directory.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects configured in the envpact secrets vault.

tools.name: list_shared
tools.description: List all shared secret names from the envpact vault. Values are NEVER returned — only names are listed for security.

tools.name: list_environments
tools.description: List all environments configured for a specific project (e.g., development, staging, production).

tools.name: add_secret
tools.description: Add or update a project-specific secret in the envpact vault. Use 'shared.KEY_NAME' as the value to reference a shared secret. Pass an environment to scope the secret to that environment only.

environment.description: Optional. If set, the secret is stored as part of a per-environment object.

tools.name: add_shared_secret
tools.description: Add or update a shared secret. Shared secrets can be referenced by any project using 'shared.KEY_NAME' syntax.

tools.name: rotate_secret
tools.description: Rotate a shared secret. Updates the value and returns the list of affected projects. Optionally syncs to GitHub Actions for all of them.

tools.name: sync_github
tools.description: Sync all resolved secrets for a project to GitHub Actions repository secrets via the gh CLI.
